title: gomphostemma strobilinum var. viride
intro: Gomphostemma strobilinum var. viride, also known as Gomphostemma viride, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Gomphostemma viride include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Gomphostemma viride is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it may also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and ointments.
